scope: Cycle 24: Wire BiomeRadial selector + faction dashboard + biome-key passthrough

bugs_found.description: _create_dashboard() never called _layout_dashboard() — dashboard rendered at (0,0) until resize event. Fixed by adding _layout_all() call in _ready() after all component creation.
var BIOME_DATA := uses := type inference with CONST[index] (project rule violation). Fixed to var BIOME_DATA: Dictionary =.

overall_assessment: Code review found 2 bugs in new code (1 CRITICAL layout bug, 1 HIGH style violation), both fixed before push. Signal wiring verified safe (is_connected guard). ProgressBar StyleBox overrides use correct Godot 4 keys. Faction iteration over Array[String] correct. Entry animation dashboard fade-in properly sequenced. 31 total bugs fixed across 24 cycles.
